ai_program: Model Hub + Inference API + Enterprise Hub
evidence: 1.2M+ models hosted; 5M+ developer users; open-source hub for entire AI ecosystem; Transformers library 140M+ downloads
strength: Central nervous system of open-source AI — every lab publishes here
friction: Monetization gap — massive usage, limited enterprise revenue conversion
top_intervention: Build compliance and governance layer on top of Model Hub — enterprise teams need audit trails
summary: Hugging Face is a LOW risk system with an adaptation latency score of 0.65/5.0. Primary bottleneck: Feedback Delay — driven by Missing observability / measurement gaps. System is adapting well. Maintain current trajectory and learning velocity.

evidence: AWS 19% growth (below Azure 39% and Google 30%); Trainium chip competitive with NVIDIA; Bedrock multi-model approach; Anthropic investment $4B

friction: AI growth rate (19%) below peers despite largest infrastructure investment; Bedrock adoption slower than Azure OpenAI

summary: Amazon AWS is a LOW risk system with an adaptation latency score of 1.75/5.0. Primary bottleneck: Feedback Delay — driven by Missing observability / measurement gaps. System is adapting well. Maintain current trajectory and learning velocity.

interventions.action: Add telemetry to all production systems — zero blind spots
Implement real-time operational dashboards with automated anomaly detection
Create feedback loop from outcomes back to input signal detection
